heading: Appropriations to carry out sections 2632 and 2633
label: 2634 Appropriations to carry out sections 2632 and 2633
text: For the purpose of carrying out the provisions of sections 2632 and 2633 of this title there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as the Congress may from time to time determine to be necessary.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 1181j of this title
